A2 Airport Bus Timings Abu Dhabi Airport ECC to Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Street

September 18, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install

UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Among these routes, the A2 bus stands out as a vital artery, facilitating convenient travel across key areas of the city.

In this guide, We delve into the details of the A2 bus route, uncovering its significance and the destinations it serves. Because it helps them to know the route and the places which passed by the Bus. They want to see the beauty of Abu Dhabi city by taking the bus of a2. So, we will show you the latest of timetable of Abu Dhabi airport bus a2. Contents

Abu Dhabi Airport Bus A2 Timetable

By knowing it, you will know the street and the landmarks of Abu Dhabi city. And here is the timetable.

From Abu Dhabi Airport ECC From Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Street

07:00 06:59

Download PDF Bus A2

For full schedule details, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for A2 Bus Timings. Additionally, for the schedule from Mazyad Mall to Razim Street, you can refer to the timetable provided below:

Abu Dhabi A2 Bus Route and Destination

The A2 bus route traverses a strategic path through Abu Dhabi, linking important landmarks, residential areas, and commercial hubs. While specific details may be subject to change, the route typically encompasses major thoroughfares and key locations within the city.

The A2 bus route serves a variety of destinations, providing passengers with access to diverse attractions and amenities. Some notable stops along the route may include:1. Abu Dhabi Intl Airport Terminal A Arrival

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Sultan Bin Zayed St - Al Jazeera Sports Club

  2. Sultan Bin Zayed St - Mohamed Bin Khalifa St

  3. Sultan Bin Zayed St - Abu Dhabi Bus Station

  4. Sultan Bin Zayed St - Mariam Bin Said Mosque

  5. Sultan Bin Zayed The First St - Gold Center

  6. Sultan Bin Zayed St - Capital Park

  7. Saeedn Bin Ahmed Al Otaiba St - Khalifa Bin Zayed St

  8. Khalifa St

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the M3 bus route, which runs from Abu Dhabi University Main Gate to Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI, and the 216 route, which travels from Al Shahama Bus Station to Mohamed Bin Zayed City Bus Station.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 18, 2025.
